title: Vietnamese Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A comforting and flavorful soup made with Vietnamese-style chicken and silky noodles.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, chicken broth, and water. Bring to a boil.
Add the silky noodles and cook according to package instructions.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of fish sauce, if desired.
